---
title: "Alberto Mariola"
image: "avatar.jpg"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: ""
  - label: Twitter
    url: "https://twitter.com/"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/langestroop"
  - label: Email
    url: "a.mariola@protonmail.ch"
output:
  postcards::jolla
---
 
I am a Sussex Neuroscience PhD candidate working at the Sackler Centre for Consciousness Science
